series_metadata.series_description: Record contains JFS 07014, Tax Information Safeguarding Authorization Agreement, signed by agency employees certifying employee understands the agency’s security policy and procedures for Safeguarding vital IRS information. This signed form grants employees access to federal tax information. Record also contains JFS 07072, Safeguarding of Internal Revenue Service, Ohio Department of Taxation, Federal Parent Locator Service, and Unemployment Compensation Information form signed by applicable county Child Support Enforcement Agency director.
